meaning: v.冲淡,变淡,变弱,稀释adj.淡的,弱的,稀释的
examples: Dilute the paint with water until it is the consistency of milk.
If you give your baby juice, dilute it well with cooled, boiled water.
Zinc displaces the hydrogen of dilute acids.
That takes time, and quality time, too, which we cannot dilute by churning out yet more babies.
A123 recently issued new convertible bonds in 2011 that will subsequently dilute EPS upon conversion.
